§ 01Confirmation of Receipt

Dear {{recipientName}},

This letter confirms that Forhemit Transition Stewardship ("Forhemit") has received the executed {{ndaType}} dated {{ndaSignedDate}}, signed by {{recipientName}} on behalf of {{companyName}}.

Confirmed
NDA Received and On File
{{ndaSignedDate}}
{{sentDate}}
{{ndaType}}
§ 02What This Means

With the executed NDA in place, the parties may now share confidential and proprietary information related to the potential employee ownership transition. This includes, but is not limited to:

• Financial statements, tax returns, and projections
• Operational data, employee information, and organizational charts
• Deal structures, valuations, and transaction terms
• Any other materials marked or designated as confidential

Next Step: Forhemit will share the applicable transaction materials and begin the qualification process. You will receive a follow-up communication within 2 business days outlining next steps.
§ 03Contact

If you have questions about the NDA or the transaction process, please contact:

deals@forhemit.com
{{ref}}

Please reference the above number in all correspondence related to this agreement.

—Forhemit Transition Stewardship
Forhemit Transition Stewardship
California Public Benefit Corporation
Authorized Representative

This confirmation does not modify the terms of the executed NDA.
